commands.command: P7D hot path forbidden token scan

commands.summary: HotPathContractGuard tests passed for allocation, blocking, logging, mutable graph access, and non-hot-path allowance.

tests_covered: Allocation attempt is rejected inside hot path
Blocking attempt is rejected inside hot path
Logging attempt is rejected inside hot path
Mutable graph access attempt is rejected inside hot path
forbidden_operations_checked: No dynamic allocation token in hot-path P7D runtime files
No mutex, condition_variable, future wait, sleep, file IO, network IO, logging, or string formatting token
No mutable graph access accepted by debug guard
